name: Parakeet
author: TypeWhisper
description: Local speech-to-text powered by NVIDIA Parakeet TDT. Fast and accurate, 25 languages.

descriptions.de: Lokale Spracherkennung mit NVIDIA Parakeet TDT. Schnell und praezise, 25 Sprachen.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 由 NVIDIA Parakeet TDT 提供本地语音转文字，快速精准，支持 25 种欧洲语言。
